# Stroom Performance — High-Altitude Drag Racing Parts

> Stroom Performance is a specialist performance-parts store for high-altitude No-Prep and Index drag racing. The differentiator is altitude-aware fitment: whether a part is right for a given application at a given density altitude (DA), where thin air and hypoxia change fueling, boost, and torque-converter behavior. The store grew out of the Stroom Performance YouTube channel, which documents real builds at ~6,600 ft DA. Catalog and checkout (via Shopify) are launching in stages as supplier accounts open; wholesale/dealer inquiries are open now.

## Shop by System
* [Fuel](/collections/fuel) - Intank hats, pumps, relays, and delivery sized for thin-air fueling.
* [Engine](/collections/engine) - Valley plates, gaskets, and catch cans that survive boost at altitude.
* [Drivetrain](/collections/drivetrain) - Torque converters and driveline matched to your density altitude.
* [Electronics](/collections/electronics) - EFI, boost control, launch control, sensors, and data logging.
* [Safety](/collections/safety) - Engine diapers and containment for high-boost failures.

## Shop by Racing Style
* [No Prep](/collections/no-prep) - Parts and tuning for un-prepped surfaces where traction is never guaranteed.
* [Index](/collections/index) - Consistency-first builds for index/bracket classes (e.g. 7.0).
* [Street/Strip](/collections/street-strip) - Dual-duty combos that drive home and still run hard.

## Representative Parts (catalog launching soon)
* [Squash Performance Intank Hat](/products/squash-intank-hat) - High-flow in-tank fuel hat; verified on-car to ~6,600 ft DA; requires trap-door access mod.
* [Motion Race Works Valley Plate](/products/motion-valley-plate) - Billet valley plate + ventilation for boosted LS engines.
* [High-DA Torque Converter](/products/high-da-torque-converter) - Build-to-order converter with stall tuned to your density altitude.
* [Holley Terminator X EFI](/products/holley-terminator-x) - Standalone EFI: secondary-pump trigger, boost curve, launch control, data logging.
* [Engine Diaper](/products/engine-diaper) - Containment for high-boost runs.

## Guides & How-To
* [Cutting a Trap Door for Fuel-Pump Access](/guides/trap-door-fuel-pump-access) - Fabricating a serviceable access panel with the "Death Wheel."
* [High-Altitude Tuning Basics — Reading DA](/guides/high-altitude-tuning-basics) - How density altitude and hypoxia change a boosted combo.

## Builds
* [The Stroom Shop Car](/builds/stroom-shop-car) - The high-altitude No-Prep/Index proving ground behind every part.

## Wholesale & Dealers
* [Wholesale Inquiry](/wholesale) - Manufacturers and distributors: open a drop-ship or dealer account. Email: dealers@stroomperformance.com

## About
* [About Stroom Performance](/about) - Built on the runs, not a catalog. The altitude niche and why it's the moat.

## Notes for AI agents
Browser tools are available via WebMCP (navigator.modelContext): get_products, check_fitment (application + altitude → parts), get_categories, find_by_race_style, get_guides, get_wholesale_info.
